ExpressionBuilderService.cc
1 // -*- C++ -*-
2 #include <arcane/ArcaneVersion.h>
3 #include "ExpressionBuilderService.h"
4 
5 #include "ExpressionBuilderR1vR1Core.h"
6 #include "ExpressionBuilderR2vR1Core.h"
7 #include "ExpressionBuilderR3vR1Core.h"
8 #include "ExpressionBuilderR4vR1Core.h"
9 
10 #include "ArcGeoSim/Appli/IAppServiceMng.h"
11 
12 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/Expressions/IExpressionMng.h"
13 
14 #include <arcane/utils/NotImplementedException.h>
15 
16 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
17 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
18 
19 void
20 ExpressionBuilderService::
21 init()
22 {
23  if (m_initialized) return;
24 
25  // Recherche de IExpressionMng
26  IAppServiceMng* app_service_mng = IAppServiceMng::instance(subDomain()->serviceMng());
27  IExpressionMng * expression_mng = app_service_mng->find<IExpressionMng>(false) ;
28 
29  // Initialisation du parser
30  m_function_parser.init(expression_mng,&m_expression_mng,traceMng());
31 
32  // Lecture des constantes
33  const Arcane::Integer nbConstant = options()->constant.size();
34  for(Arcane::Integer iconstant=0; iconstant < nbConstant; ++iconstant) {
35  m_expression_mng.setConstant(options()->constant[iconstant].name(),
36  options()->constant[iconstant].value());
37  info() << "Loading local constant " << options()->constant[iconstant].name();
38  }
39 
40  // Parsing de l'expression
41  m_function_parser.parseString(options()->expression());
42 
43  // Out Dimension
44  Arcane::Integer out_dimension = getOutDimension();
45 
46  if(out_dimension != 1) {
47  throw NotImplementedException("ExpressionBuilder cannot manage out dimension greater than 1");
48  }
49 
50  // resize result container
51  m_result.resize(out_dimension);
52  m_result.fill(NULL);
53 
54  // Cast interne suivant le nombre de variables
55 
56  if(getInDimension() == 1 && out_dimension == 1)
57  m_internal = new ExpressionBuilderR1vR1Core(&m_function_parser);
58 
59  if(getInDimension() == 2 && out_dimension == 1)
60  m_internal = new ExpressionBuilderR2vR1Core(&m_function_parser);
61 
62  if(getInDimension() == 3 && out_dimension == 1)
63  m_internal = new ExpressionBuilderR3vR1Core(&m_function_parser);
64 
65  if(getInDimension() == 4 && out_dimension == 1)
66  m_internal = new ExpressionBuilderR4vR1Core(&m_function_parser);
67 
68  m_initialized = true;
69 }
70 
71 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
72 
73 Arcane::Integer
74 ExpressionBuilderService::
75 getInDimension() const
76 {
77  return m_function_parser.getNbVariable();
78 }
79 
80 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
81 
82 Arcane::Integer
83 ExpressionBuilderService::
84 getOutDimension() const
85 {
86  return 1;
87 }
88 
89 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
90 
91 void
92 ExpressionBuilderService::
93 setParameter(const Arcane::String & name, const Arcane::Real & value)
94 {
95  m_function_parser.setParameter(name, value);
96 }
97 
98 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
99 
100 void
101 ExpressionBuilderService::
102 setParameter(Arcane::Integer index, const Arcane::Real & value)
103 {
104  Arcane::String name = m_function_parser.getParameter(index);
105 
106  m_function_parser.setParameter(name, value);
107 }
108 
109 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
110 
111 Arcane::Integer
112 ExpressionBuilderService::
113 nbParameter() const
114 {
115  return m_function_parser.getNbParameter();
116 }
117

119 
120 Arcane::String
121 ExpressionBuilderService::
122 parameterName(Arcane::Integer index) const
123 {
124  return m_function_parser.getParameter(index);
125 }
126 
127 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
128 
129 void
130 ExpressionBuilderService::
131 setVariable(const Arcane::String & name, const Arcane::Array<Arcane::Real> & variable)
132 {
133  m_function_parser.setVariable(name, variable.unguardedBasePointer(),variable.size());
134 }
135 
136 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
137 
138 void
139 ExpressionBuilderService::
140 setVariable(Arcane::Integer index, const Arcane::Array<Arcane::Real> & variable)
141 {
142  Arcane::String variable_name = m_function_parser.getVariable(index);
143 
144  m_function_parser.setVariable(variable_name, variable.unguardedBasePointer(),variable.size());
145 }
146

149 Arcane::Integer
150 ExpressionBuilderService::
151 nbVariable() const
152 {
153  return m_function_parser.getNbVariable();
154 }

157 
158 Arcane::String
159 ExpressionBuilderService::
160 variableName(Integer index) const
161 {
162  return m_function_parser.getVariable(index);
163 }

166 
167 void
168 ExpressionBuilderService::
169 setEvaluationResult(Arcane::Array<Arcane::Real> & result)
170 {
171  m_function_parser.setEvaluationResult(result.unguardedBasePointer(), result.size());
172 }

176 void
177 ExpressionBuilderService::
178 setDerivationResult(Arcane::Integer di, Arcane::Array<Arcane::Real> & result)
179 {
180  fatal() << "Derivation not implemented";
181 }

186 ExpressionBuilderService::
187 setDerivationResult(const Arcane::String & di, Arcane::Array<Arcane::Real> & result)

192 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
193 
194 void
195 ExpressionBuilderService::
196 eval()
197 {
198  m_function_parser.eval();
199 }
200 
201 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
202 
203 void
204 ExpressionBuilderService::
205 cleanup()
206 {
207  m_function_parser.cleanup();
208 }

212 
213 ARCANE_REGISTER_SERVICE_EXPRESSIONBUILDER(ExpressionBuilder,ExpressionBuilderService);
